items.name: Healing Potion
items.description: This is pretty much the best healing potion in any videogame ever. One use per spawn.

items.name: Body Swap Potion
items.description: Ever wanted to see what it was like to live as someone else?  Wonder no more!

items.name: Subspace Tripmine
items.description: WARNING: HIGH EXPLOSIVE DEVICE. When triggered, this devastating weapon rips a gashing hole in the fabric of reality - subsequent spacetime reification results in a large explosion. USE: Drop mine. Once the mine stops moving, it will enter subspace and become invisible. At this point the mine is armed. Touching the mine will set it off...

items.name: Slateskin Potion
items.description: Ingredients: one part dust from the oldest mountain, two parts dirt from the deepest sea, three parts lava from the core of the earth, and one splinter from the Rock of Prometheus. Drinking this potion transforms your skin into rock, allowing you to take more damage than the average Robloxian. It also makes you heavier, which will slow you down slightly.

items.name: Spartan Sword
items.description: Real Spartans actually hate it when other people argue over what is and isn't Sparta.

items.name: Ye Olde Fire Breath Potion
items.description: Guzzle this down to shoot flames out of your mouth.  What an impressive party trick!

items.name: Zombie Staff
items.description: ZOMG - Zombies!!  This staff summons 5 zombies to do your bidding.

items.name: Winged Magical Staff
items.description: The perfect tool for fighting evil in the daylight or moonlight. Double jump to fly.  Control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys. Click to shoot neon pink orbs at your enemies!

items.name: Dark Spellbook of the Forgotten
items.description: Learn to cast one of the following spells - The Orb of Onica, The Spikes of Speicla or The Freeze of Fontican.

items.name: Riptide
items.description: Win Percy Jackson's legendary sword, Riptide, by playing SFOTH: Percy Jackson Sea of Monsters Edition! Catch Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters in theaters August 7.

items.name: Stravant's Lightning
items.description: Run like the wind and shoot deadly lightning beams at people. We're always having to tell him no lightning in the office...

items.name: Crescendo, The Soul Stealer
items.description: Forged with fiery flames and a demon's eye the Crescendo ascends from its ancient sleep with a thundering tone.

items.name: Sword of Darkness
items.description: Dare to reach out your hand into the darkness, to pull another hand into the dark from the light.

items.name: ROBAR eXtreme Chocolate Crunch
items.description: SNAP INTO A ROBAR!

items.name: Telamonster: the Chaos Edge
items.description: “The lions sing and the hills take flight. The moon by day, and the sun by night. Blind woman, deaf man, jackdaw fool. Let the Lord of Chaos rule.”

items.name: All-Seeing Sentry
items.description: These sentries see your enemies so you don't have to!

items.name: Taxi
items.description: There's no better way to get around ROBLOX!  Be careful though - if you hit other players it will do damage!

items.name: Linked Sword
items.description: With blood and iron.

items.name: Captain Steelshanks Recruiting Staff
items.description: Captain Steelshanks is recruiting a crew for his vessel, the Ironsides.  Don't want to be a pirate?  Too bad.

items.name: Staff of the Woodlands
items.description: Druids of the Great Forest use the mystical powers of this wooden staff to camouflage themselves as they travel through the hinterlands. Use of this staff renders your character difficult to see for a short while.

items.name: Geolocator
items.description: This military-grade geolocator is designed to withstand a 1000 foot fall. It will point true North in any environment, anywhere on the planet, with an accuracy of .0001 degrees...

items.name: Sword of the Epicblueness
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 16 to 22 damage. Hit the 'Q' key, to shoot blue flames out in all directions, which will knock back your enemies and deal 25 additional damage! This special has a 10 second cool down. The Epicblueness is the stuff of vampires and will restore 25% of your health.

items.name: Trollamon
items.description: This Tiny Trolling Telamon will follow you around and throw his precious fried chicken at your enemies- doing 15 damage per chicken strike.  Justice has never been more savory.

items.name: Super Speedy Purple Potion
items.description: This speed potion is very nearly perfect.  Once activated your walk speed will be increased to 50.  One side effect we should mention is that you will turn temporarily purple and sparkly.  Like we said ... very nearly perfect.

items.name: Spec Epsilon Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: The superintelligent cloud people of the distant future find the history of human conflict hilarious and ironic. To that end, they created these weapons to sell in museum gift shops as a living reminder of the pinnacle of human stupidity. (WHY DO YOU NEED HAND TO HAND WEAPONS WHEN YOU HAVE LAZORS?!) Because the cloud people are incorporeal, the swords are completely harmless and they allow their young to play with them.

items.name: Attack Ocelot
items.description: "I've never seen an ocelot!" This ocelot companion follows you around and chases after enemies.

items.name: Medusa Head
items.description: Turn your enemies to stone for 5 seconds with this frightning Medusa head.

items.name: Rainbowrath: The Avenger
items.description: This magical rainbow unicorn blade will mean the end of all your foes. Click to swing the sword dealing 12 to 16 damage. Double tap the space bar to get wings to appear, which you can use to fly while swinging your sword!

items.name: Portable Justice
items.description: Keep your foes on lockdown!
